loop1.title: Voltage Live Health
loop1.note: Showing live phase voltages (R/Y/B) and total deviation. Rate Change (V/min) is not directly computable from a single basket column and is omitted from numeric fields; deviation is derived from the logged deviation percentage.

loop1.title: Voltage History
loop1.note: Showing per-phase voltage history and deviation — sag/swell event counts are not measured for this asset.
